articles.title: Bitcoin Proponent Rips Into ‘Centralized Garbage’ XRP, Foresees It Crashing To Virtually Zero Against BTC
articles.description: Max Keiser, self-proclaimed Bitcoin maxi and American podcaster, has once again blasted Ripple-promoted token XRP, stirring community rage.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Outperforms Bitcoin and Ethereum in This Key Metric: Details
articles.description: Check out the latest achievement of Cardano's ADA.

articles.title: Cardano Takes Lead in Development Activity Amidst Crypto Market Decline
articles.description: Amidst the recent downturn in the cryptocurrency market, Cardano (ADA) has emerged as the leader in development activity, surpassing other major players like Polkadot and Ethereum.

articles.title: Mt. Gox Appears Set To Unlock 200,000 Bitcoin For Creditor Repayments: Devastating BTC Dump Incoming?
articles.description: Mt. Gox, the crypto exchange from which 850,000 bitcoin (BTC) was stolen nearly a decade ago, is getting ready to commence reimbursements of BTC as it reportedly reached out to creditors to confirm their identity and the ownership of exchange addresses.

articles.title: Nine new spot bitcoin ETFs amass over 100,000 BTC in seven days of trading
articles.description: New spot bitcoin ETFs, excluding Grayscale’s converted fund, have reached more than 100,000 BTC in holdings after just seven days of trading.
